# Alive5

> Alive5 is a unified inbox A.I. chatbot platform that automates customer
> conversations across live chat, SMS, and social messaging. The A.I. is
> trained only on your business knowledge — zero hallucinations, your data
> stays private. Live in days, not weeks. SOC 2 Type 2 + GDPR compliant.

## Key facts

- **Resolution rate:** 90%+ of inquiries answered by A.I.
- **ROI:** 5× — $1 spent saves $5 (guaranteed)
- **Channels:** Live web chat, SMS / texting, Facebook Messenger, email inbox
- **Pricing:**
  - 60-day pilot: $500 one-time, done-for-you launch + training + reporting
  - Go Live: $1 per A.I. conversation, $500/mo minimum, volume discounts
  - Add-ons: $30/mo per user license, $0.03/credit SMS
- **Infrastructure:** Amazon Bedrock + Anthropic Claude, private VPC, zero data retention
- **Compliance:** SOC 2 Type 2, GDPR, BAA available
